title: coap_msg.c: zcbor state backtracking uses incorrect pattern
close_reason: Fixed: Removed incorrect zcbor state backtracking. The key is already successfully decoded, so we just skip the value with one zcbor_any_skip() call. Removed unnecessary zcbor_pop_error(), state restoration, and key_state variable at both locations (lines 468-471 and 775-779).
